claim: The x402 payment protocol from Coinbase enables agents to pay for tools using USDC stablecoins on-chain, solving the problem of giving agents access to paid services without exposing credentials
actionable: Implement x402 payment headers in your agent-accessible APIs to enable autonomous tool purchases while keeping agent context free of private keys
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ondra Urban: Agents with Wallets? Putting 25,000 Tools on x402

claim: The 'exact scheme' in x402 v1 requires specifying exact payment amounts upfront, which breaks for usage-based pricing where output is unknown (e.g., LLM tokens, database queries)
actionable: If using x402 for usage-based services, avoid the exact scheme and instead use the up_to scheme or implement exact-with-refunds pattern to charge a limit then return unused funds
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ondra Urban: Agents with Wallets? Putting 25,000 Tools on x402

claim: x402 v2 moved all protocol information to HTTP headers instead of JSON response bodies, enabling middleware-based implementation without API response changes
actionable: When implementing x402 payment protocols, use v2 with header-based configuration to avoid modifying existing API response schemas
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ondra Urban: Agents with Wallets? Putting 25,000 Tools on x402

claim: Never put private keys in agent context - instead use tools like mcpc (MCP CLI) that store credentials in system keychain and only pass payment signatures to the agent
actionable: Design agent payment systems to keep private keys out of LLM context by using separate credential management tools that return only signatures or tokens
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ondra Urban: Agents with Wallets? Putting 25,000 Tools on x402

claim: x402 payment flow requires verification before work, then work execution, then settlement - not payment before work - because settlement takes time on blockchain
actionable: Implement x402 with the order: verify payment signature -> execute work -> settle transaction -> return results, avoiding blocking on blockchain confirmation
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Ondra Urban: Agents with Wallets? Putting 25,000 Tools on x402
